db.element: div#jobsByConnection > div > div > table > thead > tr > th:nth-of-type(2)

comments.content:
`Affects 6.2 CU4 SP3 and Under`

The Timezone of the Job Monitor typically reports their results in UTC.

A **hotfix** exists to show the Job Monitor with **Application Timezone** (Settings -> Application Timezone)

Ticket #210917
comments.author: Samuel Prashker (sprashker@securonix.com)
Samuel Prashker (sprashker@securonix.com)
comments.content:
`When selecting between Console or Ingester`

It is recommended to add a datasource to a **Remote Ingestion Node** and to only use the Console in absolutely necessary scenarios. 

In the event of a **Console-based import** keep an eye on Console resources and performance to ensure the import is not negatively affecting the broader system.
